metadata.title: ServerPunt - Affordable Servers and Components | Refurbished Hardware Europe
metadata.description: Buy refurbished servers, server components and IT hardware at ServerPunt. Competitive prices, highest quality. Dell, HP, IBM servers and more. Shipping throughout the EU.
metadata.keywords: refurbished servers, server components, dell servers, hp servers, ibm servers, server parts, it hardware, europe, cheap servers, enterprise hardware
metadata.ogTitle: ServerPunt - Affordable Refurbished Servers and Components
metadata.ogDescription: Specialist in refurbished servers and IT hardware. Dell, HP, IBM servers and components at competitive prices. Reliable and fast delivery throughout the EU.

hero.title: Your one-stop shop for
hero.subtitle: Discover our extensive selection of high-quality servers, perfectly tailored to your business needs. Reliability, performance and excellent customer service

checkout.cocNumber: Chamber of Commerce number (Only if company is filled in)
checkout.vatNumber: VAT number (Only if company is filled in)
checkout.pickupInfo: We will contact you via email for further information such as pickup time.

verify.error: An error occurred while verifying the payment.
verify.successMessage: Thank you for your order! We have successfully received your order and will process it as soon as possible.
verify.loadingHint: Continue in the opened payment window to complete your payment, or check your email for your invoice.

success.title: Thank you for your order!
success.subtitle: Your order has been placed successfully
success.step1: You will receive a confirmation email with your order details within a few minutes
success.step2: We will send you a tracking code once your order has been shipped
success.step3: If you have any questions, please contact our customer service

validation.companyFieldsRequired: Company registration and VAT number are required for business orders

errors.insufficientStock: Product {name} has insufficient stock. Available: {available}, Requested: {requested}
errors.configInsufficientStock: Configuration product {name} has insufficient stock. Available: {available}, Requested: {requested}

email.invoiceMessage: Thank you for your order! You will find the invoice attached. Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions.

footer.refurbishedNotice: Atjaunotajiem produktiem var būt lietošanas pazīmes. Garantija tiek piemērota saskaņā ar mūsu <warrantyLink>garantijas politiku</warrantyLink>.

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.description: We use cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website. For more information about how we use cookies, please see our cookie policy.
cookie.acceptHint: By clicking <accept>Accept</accept>, you accept our cookie policy.

products.title: Products
products.productsSubtitle: Find the perfect device for your needs from our carefully curated collections
products.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search term or adjust the filters.

featured.title: Best Sellers
featured.subtitle: Our best-selling products, chosen by our customers for their quality and reliability.

categoriesSection.title: Categories
categoriesSection.subtitle: Browse the product categories we offer.

product.brandNewDescription: This product is brand new and not refurbished. It comes directly from the manufacturer or an authorized distributor and has never had a previous owner. You can trust that you will receive a product of the highest quality, without any signs of use or wear.
product.chooseAddons: Choose the additional components you want to add to the base product below.
product.chooseQuantity: Choose the quantity of the base product you want to order below.
product.termsDescription: Please note: Once you place an order on our website, our Terms and Conditions apply.

whatsapp.intro1: Hi! I'm the ServerPunt support chat.
whatsapp.intro2: Ask your question below and we'll forward it directly via WhatsApp.
whatsapp.defaultMessage: Hi! I need help with my order.
whatsapp.replyOrder: I have a question about my order
whatsapp.successReply: Thank you. We have received your message and will forward it to our team via WhatsApp.
whatsapp.title: ServerPunt Support
whatsapp.subtitle: Online via WhatsApp
whatsapp.sendHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line.

configurator.title: Server Configurator
configurator.pageSubtitle: Tell us what you will use the server for, how much capacity you need and what your budget is. We combine servers, memory and storage from our inventory into concrete options.
configurator.pageMetaDescription: Choose your server purpose, provide specifications and budget — we assemble configuration options from our current inventory.
configurator.savedSessionDescription: Saglabāts {date} · budžets līdz €{budget} · {count, plural, zero {# variantu} one {# variants} other {# varianti}}
configurator.useCaseTitle: What will you use the server for?
configurator.useCaseSubtitle: Describe your situation in your own words, or choose a category below.
configurator.describeUsePlaceholder: E.g. we run 20 Docker containers for client portals, with PostgreSQL and daily backups. Peaks around 500 concurrent users…
configurator.describeUseHint: At least {min} characters if you don't choose a category. Max. 2000 characters.
configurator.vmCount: How many VMs do you want to run?
configurator.generalHint: For general business IT, we base our recommendation on a standard workload. You can specify your budget in the next step.
configurator.budgetSubtitle: Total amount excl. VAT for hardware — we search our current inventory.
configurator.customRequestPlaceholder: E.g. Dell or HP only, at least 128 GB RAM, NVMe storage, quiet/low power, specific RAID setup…
configurator.customRequestHint: Our AI (or smart matching) takes this into account when selecting hardware. Max. 1500 characters.
configurator.resultsFooter: Prices and stock come live from our database. Contact us for custom solutions or multiple hosts.
configurator.noResults: No matching configurations found. Increase your budget or adjust the specifications.
configurator.cannotAddToCart: This configuration cannot be added to the cart.

virtualization.label: Virtualisation (VMs)
virtualization.description: Hypervisors, containers and multiple virtual machines on one or more hosts.

webhosting.label: Web hosting & applications
webhosting.description: Websites, APIs and line-of-business applications with predictable traffic.

database.label: Database & analytics
database.description: SQL/NoSQL workloads, reporting and data-intensive processes.

storage.label: Storage & backup
storage.description: NAS, backups, archive and shared file storage.

development.label: Development & test
development.description: CI/CD, staging environments and internal tooling.

general.label: General business IT
general.description: Mix of workloads — file server, AD, monitoring and more.

companyFields.reverseChargeHint: Valid VAT number from your country = 0% VAT (intra-community supply)
companyFields.viesInvalid: PVN numuru nevarēja verificēt, izmantojot VIES
companyFields.hintNlVat: NL + 9 digits + B + 2 digits, e.g. NL123456789B01
